meta.title: Modern Events Calendar — Demo Export
meta.description: Demo site with Modern Events Calendar data ready to export for GatherPress migration testing.
meta.author: WordPress Telex

steps.code:
<?php
require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php';

// Create MEC categories.
if ( ! term_exists( 'Webinar', 'mec_category' ) ) {
	wp_insert_term( 'Webinar', 'mec_category', array( 'slug' => 'webinar' ) );
}
if ( ! term_exists( 'Seminar', 'mec_category' ) ) {
	wp_insert_term( 'Seminar', 'mec_category', array( 'slug' => 'seminar' ) );
}
if ( ! term_exists( 'Social', 'mec_category' ) ) {
	wp_insert_term( 'Social', 'mec_category', array( 'slug' => 'social' ) );
}

// Create MEC labels.
if ( ! term_exists( 'Featured', 'mec_label' ) ) {
	wp_insert_term( 'Featured', 'mec_label', array( 'slug' => 'featured' ) );
}
if ( ! term_exists( 'New', 'mec_label' ) ) {
	wp_insert_term( 'New', 'mec_label', array( 'slug' => 'new' ) );
}

// Create MEC locations (taxonomy terms).
$loc1_term = wp_insert_term( 'TechHub Coworking Space', 'mec_location', array( 'slug' => 'techhub-coworking' ) );
$loc2_term = wp_insert_term( 'Grand Hotel Ballroom', 'mec_location', array( 'slug' => 'grand-hotel-ballroom' ) );
$loc3_term = wp_insert_term( 'Online (Zoom)', 'mec_location', array( 'slug' => 'online-zoom' ) );

// Create MEC organizers (taxonomy terms).
$org1_term = wp_insert_term( 'WordPress Community Team', 'mec_organizer', array( 'slug' => 'wp-community-team' ) );
$org2_term = wp_insert_term( 'Developer Academy', 'mec_organizer', array( 'slug' => 'developer-academy' ) );

// Create events.
$ev1 = wp_insert_post( array(
	'post_title'   => 'Introduction to Full Site Editing',
	'post_content' => 'Learn the fundamentals of WordPress Full Site Editing, including template editing, global styles, and block patterns.',
	'post_type'    => 'mec-events',
	'post_status'  => 'publish',
) );
if ( $ev1 ) {
	update_post_meta( $ev1, 'mec_start_date', '2025-08-20' );
	update_post_meta( $ev1, 'mec_end_date', '2025-08-20' );
	update_post_meta( $ev1, 'mec_start_time_hour', '2' );
	update_post_meta( $ev1, 'mec_start_time_minutes', '00' );
	update_post_meta( $ev1, 'mec_start_time_ampm', 'PM' );
	update_post_meta( $ev1, 'mec_end_time_hour', '4' );
	update_post_meta( $ev1, 'mec_end_time_minutes', '00' );
	update_post_meta( $ev1, 'mec_end_time_ampm', 'PM' );
	wp_set_object_terms( $ev1, array( 'webinar' ), 'mec_category' );
	wp_set_object_terms( $ev1, array( 'featured' ), 'mec_label' );
	if ( ! is_wp_error( $loc3_term ) ) {
		wp_set_object_terms( $ev1, array( intval( is_array( $loc3_term ) ? $loc3_term['term_id'] : $loc3_term ) ), 'mec_location' );
	}
	if ( ! is_wp_error( $org1_term ) ) {
		wp_set_object_terms( $ev1, array( intval( is_array( $org1_term ) ? $org1_term['term_id'] : $org1_term ) ), 'mec_organizer' );
	}
}

$ev2 = wp_insert_post( array(
	'post_title'   => 'Advanced Custom Blocks Seminar',
	'post_content' => 'Deep dive into creating custom blocks with React, PHP rendering, and the WordPress Interactivity API.',
	'post_type'    => 'mec-events',
	'post_status'  => 'publish',
) );
if ( $ev2 ) {
	update_post_meta( $ev2, 'mec_start_date', '2025-09-12' );
	update_post_meta( $ev2, 'mec_end_date', '2025-09-12' );
	update_post_meta( $ev2, 'mec_start_time_hour', '10' );
	update_post_meta( $ev2, 'mec_start_time_minutes', '00' );
	update_post_meta( $ev2, 'mec_start_time_ampm', 'AM' );
	update_post_meta( $ev2, 'mec_end_time_hour', '1' );
	update_post_meta( $ev2, 'mec_end_time_minutes', '00' );
	update_post_meta( $ev2, 'mec_end_time_ampm', 'PM' );
	wp_set_object_terms( $ev2, array( 'seminar' ), 'mec_category' );
	wp_set_object_terms( $ev2, array( 'new' ), 'mec_label' );
	if ( ! is_wp_error( $loc1_term ) ) {
		wp_set_object_terms( $ev2, array( intval( is_array( $loc1_term ) ? $loc1_term['term_id'] : $loc1_term ) ), 'mec_location' );
	}
	if ( ! is_wp_error( $org2_term ) ) {
		wp_set_object_terms( $ev2, array( intval( is_array( $org2_term ) ? $org2_term['term_id'] : $org2_term ) ), 'mec_organizer' );
	}
}

$ev3 = wp_insert_post( array(
	'post_title'   => 'WP Community Social Dinner',
	'post_content' => 'An informal dinner for WordPress enthusiasts to connect, share stories, and enjoy great food together.',
	'post_type'    => 'mec-events',
	'post_status'  => 'publish',
) );
if ( $ev3 ) {
	update_post_meta( $ev3, 'mec_start_date', '2025-10-08' );
	update_post_meta( $ev3, 'mec_end_date', '2025-10-08' );
	update_post_meta( $ev3, 'mec_start_time_hour', '7' );
	update_post_meta( $ev3, 'mec_start_time_minutes', '30' );
	update_post_meta( $ev3, 'mec_start_time_ampm', 'PM' );
	update_post_meta( $ev3, 'mec_end_time_hour', '10' );
	update_post_meta( $ev3, 'mec_end_time_minutes', '00' );
	update_post_meta( $ev3, 'mec_end_time_ampm', 'PM' );
	wp_set_object_terms( $ev3, array( 'social' ), 'mec_category' );
	if ( ! is_wp_error( $loc2_term ) ) {
		wp_set_object_terms( $ev3, array( intval( is_array( $loc2_term ) ? $loc2_term['term_id'] : $loc2_term ) ), 'mec_location' );
	}
	if ( ! is_wp_error( $org1_term ) ) {
		wp_set_object_terms( $ev3, array( intval( is_array( $org1_term ) ? $org1_term['term_id'] : $org1_term ) ), 'mec_organizer' );
	}
}

flush_rewrite_rules();
